claims.summary: The warmth pulse loop should complete the taper and preserve the transition into rest.
claims.disposition: verify orchestration.rs continues beyond the reported source window through warmth-phase blending, rescue checks, semantic send, and five-second pulse sleep

claims.summary: Low-fill rest should shorten predictably without collapsing below a recovery floor.
claims.disposition: verify the exact current rule is max(30, floor(0.6 * base_rest)); record that the proposed 30-to-60-percent assertion is inaccurate when the 30-second floor binds

claims.summary: Peripheral resonance should come from creations, research, or starred memories when candidates exist.
claims.disposition: verify current candidate construction and choose path populate peripheral_resonance from exactly those sources and leave it absent for an empty candidate set

claims.summary: Short rest windows could expose pulse jitter if warmth construction or dispatch becomes slow.
claims.disposition: route a bounded paused-time timing regression around a 30-second rest window; the report supplies a plausible risk but no observed latency failure
